mapper.insert: INSERT INTO checkin (activity_id, user_id, registration_id, checkin_time, qr_token, is_late) VALUES (#{activityId}, #{userId}, #{registrationId}, #{checkinTime}, #{qrToken}, #{isLate})
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.activity_id, a.title AS activity_title, c.user_id, u.username, u.real_name, c.checkin_time, c.checkout_time, c.duration_hours, c.is_late FROM checkin c LEFT JOIN activity a ON a.id = c.activity_id AND a.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = c.user_id AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE c.activity_id = #{activityId} ORDER BY c.checkin_time DESC
